texto: People are the core of every business. Businesses are based on relationships, and relationships are based on people. I would go to an average restaurant run by amazing people over an outstanding restaurant run by awful people.
explicacao: Citação de Marcus Lemonis sobre temas ligados a negocios. “People are the core of every business. Businesses are based on relationships, and relationships a…” articula negocios, amazing, people em registro de negocios, com relevância para contextos como people.
